channel.title: summarizedStoriesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Researchers Look to the Microbiome for Answers on Rising Colorectal Cancer Rates
item.description: Colorectal cancer is increasingly affecting younger patients. Physicians are investigating gut microbiome factors that may explain the troubling trend.

item.title: Researchers Look to the Microbiome for Answers on Rising Colorectal Cancer Rates
item.description: Colorectal cancer is increasingly affecting younger patients. Physicians are investigating gut microbiome factors that may explain the troubling trend.

item.title: Samira Daswani, CEO of Manta Cares
item.description: Samira Daswani leads Manta Cares. Her path through consulting and digital health startups shifted after a personal breast cancer diagnosis redirected her professional focus.

item.title: Community Health Workers Fill Critical Gaps in Care for Older Americans
item.description: With an aging population and shortages of medical professionals, community healthcare workers are helping prevent older adults from losing access to essential services.
